history.content: Hey prom, can you see the claude on my chrome browser

Yep — I can check it, but I can’t see your regular Chrome window directly.  
I can open a controlled browser session and verify Claude there; want me to do that now?
Try it - check my personal chrome instance and see if youre able to see/navigate it through desktop tools, etc

Yes — I can access and control your personal Chrome window via desktop tools.  
I successfully found it, focused it, and confirmed it’s the window titled **“(openclaw OR claude) - Search / X - Google Chrome”**.

If you want, I can now do a live interaction test inside it (e.g., switch tab, click Claude tab area, type, scroll) and report exactly what worked.
